data.content: Plan review approved. Plan is well-structured with good decomposition into 3 child knots. Key findings: (1) DB already supports arbitrary knot_type, no schema migration needed for type field. (2) Gate states (ready_to_evaluate, evaluating) fit existing is_action_state() naming convention. (3) Workflow generalization in d7dd is highest risk due to hardcoded Work-type assumptions across state.rs, state_hierarchy.rs, profile.rs, skills.rs, and poll_claim.rs. (4) profiles.toml needs new Gate profiles and skills.rs needs evaluating skill doc. (5) Open question resolved: abandoned is correct terminal state after gate failure reopens linked knots. No invariants to check.
